results.owner_or_reason: Canonical decision record (ratified 2026-07-10), not itself a build id — no coverage-index key, no feature-map/plan.json 'covers' hit. Its own gap-hunt/gaps-W6MoFZgXEW.json verdict_summary confirms 'No uncovered build gaps': every named component it decides is independently covered — orvex-studio-staging service (feature-map Service foundation pack), studio.staging.* CloudEvents + contracts catalog (feature-map 'Events on the spine' story), and FR-STG26 (coverage-index -> ENG-2175, ENG-2204, staging-corpus); the engine wiki.* outbox producer is explicitly deferred by the ADR itself to the staging delivery plan.
